dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3706 IS: Produce Prescriptions for Veterans Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Durbin introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to authorize the provision of produce prescriptions to veterans, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Produce Prescriptions for Veterans Act.

section.header: Provision of produce prescriptions to veterans

subsection.text: Paragraph (6) of section 1701 of title 38, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:
Such section is further amended by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

paragraph.text: The term produce prescription means a service in which the Secretary provides a benefit to a veteran who has a diet-related chronic condition and is food-insecure or refers such a veteran to receive a benefit, including a voucher or debit card, for the purchase of fruits and vegetables to improve a diet-related chronic condition.
